## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local `.env` files, build output, or generated reports.
- [ ] I considered Docker and CI/CD impact.
